| `sim-lib-femm-material` | `workspace` | Material, boundary, and source descriptions for FEMM models. |
| `sim-lib-femm-mesh` | `workspace` | FEMM model definition, meshing, and model validation. |
| `sim-lib-femm-ode` | `workspace` | Time integration of FEMM models as ODE right-hand sides and DAE residuals. |
| `sim-lib-femm-physics` | `workspace` | Governing physics fronts for the supported FEMM formulations. |
| `sim-lib-femm-post` | `workspace` | Post-processing of FEMM solutions into derived quantities. |
| `sim-lib-femm-prelude` | `workspace` | Umbrella prelude that installs the full FEMM library stack. |
| `sim-lib-femm-query` | `workspace` | Shared FEMM model-query callables and payloads. |
| `sim-lib-femm-sensitiv` | `workspace` | Sensitivity and adjoint analysis of FEMM quantities. |
| `sim-lib-femm-solve` | `workspace` | Linear solvers and the steady-state FEMM solve pipeline. |
| `sim-lib-femm-space` | `workspace` | Function and DOF spaces over the FEMM mesh. |
| `sim-lib-femm-tape` | `workspace` | Solve tape: cached factorizations and solutions keyed by fingerprint. |
| `xtask` | `workspace` | Repository automation wrapper for sim-femm generated documentation. |
